---
title: "Model impact report"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
params:
  data_path: ""
  prob_col: ""
  truth_col: ""
  positive: "Yes"
  fixed_cost: 0
  var_cost: 0
  tp_val: 0
  prob_accept: 1
  budget: !expr NA
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 7, fig.height = 4.5, out.width = "100%")
library(modelimpact)
library(ggplot2)
theme_set(theme_minimal())

d <- readRDS(params$data_path)

# expose the chosen columns under fixed internal names so the analysis code can
# refer to them directly
d$mi_prob  <- d[[params$prob_col]]
d$mi_truth <- d[[params$truth_col]]

pos <- params$positive
fc  <- params$fixed_cost
vc  <- params$var_cost
tv  <- params$tp_val
pa  <- params$prob_accept

has_budget <- !is.na(params$budget)
```

This report summarises the business impact of a classification model applied to
`r nrow(d)` cases, using a fixed cost of `r fc`, a variable cost of `r vc` per
targeted case and a true-positive value of `r tv`.

## Headline summary

```{r}
knitr::kable(
  impact_summary(d, fixed_cost = fc, var_cost = vc, tp_val = tv,
                 prob_accept = pa, prob_col = mi_prob, truth_col = mi_truth,
                 positive = pos)
)
```

## Costs and revenue

```{r}
autoplot(cost_revenue(d, fixed_cost = fc, var_cost = vc, tp_val = tv,
                      prob_accept = pa, prob_col = mi_prob, truth_col = mi_truth,
                      positive = pos))
```

## Profit

```{r}
autoplot(profit(d, fixed_cost = fc, var_cost = vc, tp_val = tv,
                prob_accept = pa, prob_col = mi_prob, truth_col = mi_truth,
                positive = pos))
```

## Return on investment

```{r}
autoplot(roi(d, fixed_cost = fc, var_cost = vc, tp_val = tv,
             prob_accept = pa, prob_col = mi_prob, truth_col = mi_truth,
             positive = pos))
```

## Cumulative gains

```{r}
autoplot(cumulative_gains(d, prob_col = mi_prob, truth_col = mi_truth, positive = pos))
```

## Lift

```{r}
autoplot(lift_curve(d, prob_col = mi_prob, truth_col = mi_truth, positive = pos))
```

## Marginal profit per bin

```{r}
autoplot(marginal_profit(d, fixed_cost = fc, var_cost = vc, tp_val = tv,
                         prob_accept = pa, prob_col = mi_prob, truth_col = mi_truth,
                         positive = pos))
```

```{r, results='asis', eval=has_budget}
cat("## Budget\n")
```

```{r, eval=has_budget}
knitr::kable(
  budget_profit(d, budget = params$budget, fixed_cost = fc, var_cost = vc,
                tp_val = tv, prob_accept = pa, prob_col = mi_prob,
                truth_col = mi_truth, positive = pos)
)

autoplot(budget_frontier(d, fixed_cost = fc, var_cost = vc, tp_val = tv,
                         prob_accept = pa, prob_col = mi_prob, truth_col = mi_truth,
                         positive = pos))
```
